{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Akura uniform
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] wears an [[Akura uniform]] with a bright violet script on the hem.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura]] team uniform has a high collar and a cape.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
